<unk[3:0:12]><unk[4:0:10 84 104 105 110 107]>前往死亡之山的路线该怎么办好呢……<unk[5:1]>

rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:12]><unk[4:0:10 84 104 105 110 107]>How's a guy supposed to pick a path to
Death Mountain?<unk[5:1]> A trek up a mountain
should be a <Color=red>red-hot <Color=white>adventure.
If I had a balloon like the one on the other
side of the pond, that'd spice things up a
bit. Fat chance of that though.

rows.CNzh: 激情？
rows.TWzh: 熱情？
rows.JPja: パッション？
rows.USen: Red hot?

rows.CNzh:
<unk[3:0:7]><unk[4:0:12 78 111 116 105 99 101]>哎哟，怎么回事啊，小哥？<unk[5:0]>
这是偷听我的激情呢？
要说到激情，
当然就是激情啦。
rows.TWzh:
<unk[3:0:7]><unk[4:0:12 78 111 116 105 99 101]>哎呀，這位大哥，<unk[5:0]>
你在偷聽我的熱情嗎？
你問我熱情是什麼？
熱情就是熱情啊。
rows.JPja:
<unk[3:0:7]><unk[4:0:12 78 111 116 105 99 101]>おっとなんスか おにーさん<unk[5:0]>
<Ruby={2:4}おれ>俺のパッション<Ruby={2:4}ぬす>盗み<Ruby={2:2}ぎ>聞きッスか？
パッションっつったら
パッションッスよ
rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:7]><unk[4:0:12 78 111 116 105 99 101]>What's that?<unk[5:0]> Did the fiery passion of my
monologue catch your ear?

Well, red hot is as red hot does,
my friend.

rows.CNzh:
<unk[3:0:7]><unk[4:0:30 84 97 108 107 80 111 115 105 116 105 118 101 95 48 49]>以前这一带因为死亡之山喷火，
熔岩激情全开哦。
现在已经冷却固化，
还建成了走起来好方便的<Color=red>新道路<Color=white>，
<unk[3:0:10]>说实话真是没激情啊……

<unk[3:0:263]>而从这里往东的<Color=red>山麓驿站<Color=white>出发
攀爬死亡之山的路线呢，就是旧道路，
途中还布满了怪物，

<unk[3:0:8]><unk[4:0:12 76 97 117 103 104 83]>所以是高风险又超激情啊！

<unk[3:0:263]>可是……<unk[5:0]>
我的身手就没什么激情了……
rows.TWzh:
<unk[3:0:7]><unk[4:0:30 84 97 108 107 80 111 115 105 116 105 118 101 95 48 49]>以前死亡之山還在噴火，
所以這附近都是超熱情的熔岩。
但現在熔岩不但都已經冷卻凝固，
還因此成為一條方便行走的<Color=red>新道路<Color=white>了……
<unk[3:0:10]>但老實說，這樣一來就毫無熱情了啊……

<unk[3:0:263]>不過，還有一條從東方<Color=red>山麓驛站<Color=white>
前往死亡之山的路線。
那是條老舊的道路，也充滿了大量怪物。

<unk[3:0:8]><unk[4:0:12 76 97 117 103 104 83]>所以走那條路的話就會超危險超熱情的啊！

<unk[3:0:263]>但是……<unk[5:0]>
我的身手可說是毫無熱情啊……
rows.JPja:
<unk[3:0:7]><unk[4:0:30 84 97 108 107 80 111 115 105 116 105 118 101 95 48 49]><Ruby={4:6}いぜん>以前この<Ruby={2:4}あた>辺りは デスマウンテンが
<Ruby={4:6}ふんか>噴火して <Ruby={4:8}ようがん>溶岩パッション<Ruby={4:8}ぜんかい>全開だったんスけど
もう<Ruby={2:2}ひ>冷え<Ruby={2:4}かた>固まっちゃった<Ruby={2:4}うえ>上に
<Ruby={2:4}ある>歩きやすい<Color=red><Ruby={6:12}しんかいどう>新街道 <Color=white>までできちゃって
<unk[3:0:10]><Ruby={4:10}しょうじき>正直 ノーパッションなんッスよ…

<unk[3:0:263]><Ruby={2:4}かた>片や ここから<Ruby={2:6}ひがし>東にある<Color=red><Ruby={4:8}さんろく>山麓の<Ruby={4:8}うまやど>馬宿<Color=white>から
デスマウンテンに<Ruby={2:4}のぼ>登るルートは
<Ruby={6:14}きゅうかいどう>旧街道で <Ruby={4:6}まもの>魔物だらけなんスけど

<unk[3:0:8]><unk[4:0:12 76 97 117 103 104 83]>その<Ruby={2:4}ぶん>分ハイリスクで <Ruby={2:6}ちょう>超パッションなんッスよ！

<unk[3:0:263]>…でも<Ruby={2:4}おれ>俺<unk[5:0]>
<Ruby={2:4}うで>腕っぷしはノーパッションなんッスよねぇ…
rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:7]><unk[4:0:30 84 97 108 107 80 111 115 105 116 105 118 101 95 48 49]>So a while back, Death Mountain was
super active—we're talking full-force,
non-stop, red-hot lava.
But now the lava's all cooled down and
hardened. It's even—ugh, I hate to say
it—made a <Color=red>new road<Color=white> that's easy to walk!
<unk[3:0:10]>And ease, my friend, is the opposite of
the "red hot" lifestyle.

<unk[3:0:263]>Now the route going up Death Mountain
from <Color=red>Foothill Stable <Color=white>to the east, on the
other hand...
That's an old, dangerous road absolutely
crawling with monsters.

<unk[3:0:8]><unk[4:0:12 76 97 117 103 104 83]>That's what I call RED HOT!


<unk[3:0:263]>But, uh...<unk[5:0]>my muscles aren't exactly ready
to take the heat right now, so that makes
my decision more complicated.

rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:7]><unk[4:0:20 84 114 111 117 98 108 101 95 48 48]>So a while back, Death Mountain was
super active—we're talking full force,
non-stop, red-hot lava.
But now the lava's all cooled down and
hardened into a <Color=red>new road <Color=white>that's super
easily walkable.
<unk[3:0:10]>And there's nothing red hot about
"easily walkable"!

<unk[3:0:263]>Now on the other hand, the route
going up to Death Mountain from
<Color=red>Foothill Stable<Color=white>...
That's an old, dangerous road absolutely
crawling with monsters. If you're looking
for "red hot," that's where to find it.
<unk[3:0:263]>Thing is...<unk[5:0]>my muscles aren't exactly ready
to take the heat, so that makes my
decision more complicated.

<unk[3:0:263]>抱歉说了这么一长串，
夜已经深了，我就此告辞……
rows.TWzh:
<unk[3:0:263]>不好意思和你聊太久了，
時間已晚，我先告辭了……

<unk[3:0:263]>Sorry, didn't mean to talk for so long. It's
already late, so I better get myself to bed.

<unk[3:0:263]>One can only remain red-hot for so many
hours a day. Time for bed so I can burn
bright tomorrow.

rows.CNzh:
<unk[3:0:263]>总之先填填肚子
再慢慢想吧。

<unk[3:0:263]>總之，我先去填飽肚子
再好好思考吧。

<unk[3:0:263]>とりあえず <Ruby={2:4}はら>腹ごしらえでもして
ゆっくり<Ruby={2:6}かんが>考えるッス
rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:263]>For now, I'm going to chew things over
with a nice meal.

rows.TWzh:
<unk[3:0:5]><unk[4:0:16 83 108 101 101 112 95 48 48]>該選擇毫無熱情的<unk[5:0]>森林驛站路線呢……<unk[5:2]>
還是超級熱情的<unk[5:0]>山麓驛站路線呢……？
rows.JPja:
<unk[3:0:5]><unk[4:0:16 83 108 101 101 112 95 48 48]>ノーパッションで <unk[5:0]><Ruby={2:4}もり>森の<Ruby={4:8}うまやど>馬宿ルートか…<unk[5:2]>
<Ruby={2:6}ちょう>超パッションで <unk[5:0]><Ruby={4:8}さんろく>山麓の<Ruby={4:8}うまやど>馬宿ルートか…
rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:5]><unk[4:0:16 83 108 101 101 112 95 48 48]>The dull 'n' drab Woodland Stable route...<unk[5:1]>
or the red-hot <unk[5:0]>Foothill Stable route...

rows.JPja:
<unk[3:0:260]>んぉっと…

<unk[3:0:263]><unk[4:0:24 83 104 105 116 97 117 99 104 105 95 48 49]>せっかくウトウトしてたのに なんスか？<unk[5:1]>
<Ruby={2:4}おれ>俺のパッション<Ruby={2:4}ぬす>盗み<Ruby={2:2}ぎ>聞きっすか？
rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:260]>Wha?


<unk[3:0:263]><unk[4:0:24 83 104 105 116 97 117 99 104 105 95 48 49]>I was finally nodding off, what is it?<unk[5:1]>
You wanna know what it means to be
red hot?

rows.CNzh:
<unk[3:0:263]>话说，我想要补充激情啊，
可以放我去睡觉吗？
rows.TWzh:
<unk[3:0:263]>是說，我想繼續補充熱情了，
可以讓我睡了嗎？
rows.JPja:
<unk[3:0:263]>ってか パッションチャージしたいんで
<Ruby={2:2}ね>寝かせてもらっていいッスかね？
rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:263]>Look, it takes sleep to burn so bright, so
will you let me recharge for a bit?

rows.JPja:
<unk[3:0:3]><unk[4:0:12 87 97 107 101 117 112]>んもぅ…… <unk[5:2]>
せっかくウトウトしてたのに…
<unk[3:0:256]>そんなに<unk[5:0]> <Ruby={2:4}おれ>俺のパッションが<Ruby={2:2}き>気になるんスか？
rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:3]><unk[4:0:12 87 97 107 101 117 112]>Ngh...<unk[5:1]> I was finally nodding off...


<unk[3:0:256]>You must <unk[5:0]>REALLY wanna learn about the
red-hot lifestyle.

rows.CNzh: 真不错啊，那个气球……
rows.TWzh: 那個氣球讓我好羨慕喔……
rows.JPja: いいなぁ あの<Ruby={4:8}ききゅう>気球…
rows.USen: I wish I had that balloon...

rows.CNzh: 选哪边好呢……
rows.TWzh: 該選哪條路才好呢……
rows.JPja: どっちにすっかなぁ…
rows.USen: How do I choose?

rows.JPja:
<unk[3:0:11]><unk[4:0:24 83 117 114 112 114 105 115 101 76 95 48 48]>ちょ なんスか なんスか！

とりま <Ruby={2:4}あめ>雨の<Ruby={2:2}あ>当たらないとこに
<Ruby={2:2}い>行かせてもらいたいッス！
rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:11]><unk[4:0:24 83 117 114 112 114 105 115 101 76 95 48 48]>Gah! Whoa! Listen, I don't do rain!


We need to get somewhere dry! Come on!

<unk[3:0:263]>话说这不是下雨了吗，<Color=red>很难攀崖<Color=white>了，
总之先休息吧。

<unk[3:0:263]>現在下雨了，會變得<Color=red>難以爬上懸崖<Color=white>，

rows.JPja:
<unk[3:0:263]>ってか <Ruby={4:6}あめふ>雨降ってたんじゃぁ <Color=red><Ruby={2:4}がけ>崖も<Ruby={2:4}のぼ>登りにくい<Color=white>し
とりま <Ruby={4:10}きゅうけい>休憩ッス
rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:263]>By the way, it's <Color=red>harder to climb cliffs <Color=white>while

<unk[3:0:263]>话说这不是下雨了吗，<Color=red>很难攀崖<Color=white>了，

我的<Color=red>铁制武器<Color=white>要是被雷劈了会变得<Color=red>一团黑<Color=white>，

rows.TWzh:
<unk[3:0:263]>現在下雨了，會變得<Color=red>難以爬上懸崖<Color=white>，

而且我帶著<Color=red>鐵製武器<Color=white>，如果打雷的話可就<Color=red>被烤焦<Color=white>啦，

rows.JPja:
<unk[3:0:263]>ってか <Ruby={4:6}あめふ>雨降ってたんじゃぁ <Color=red><Ruby={2:4}がけ>崖も<Ruby={2:4}のぼ>登りにくい<Color=white>し

<Ruby={2:4}おれ>俺の<Color=red><Ruby={2:4}てつ>鉄の<Ruby={4:4}ぶき>武器<Color=white>に <Ruby={2:8}かみなり>雷おちてきたら<Color=red><Ruby={4:6}くろこ>黒焦げ<Color=white>ッスから
とりあえず <Ruby={4:10}きゅうけい>休憩ッス
rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:263]>Also, if you thought cliffs being <Color=red>harder to
climb <Color=white>was the worst thing about a storm,
you've clearly never been zapped.
If lightning strikes my <Color=red>metal weapon<Color=white>, I'll
get <Color=red>burnt to a crisp<Color=white>! That's not the kind of
thrill I'm looking for, so I'm waiting it out.

rows.CNzh: 就待在树下好了……

rows.JPja: <Ruby={2:2}き>木の<Ruby={2:4}した>下でいいか…

rows.CNzh: 待在这里就不会被淋湿了。

rows.JPja: ここなら<Ruby={2:2}ぬ>濡れないッスかね
